import pytest
from myapp.math_utils import calculate_discount, compute_tax, average

def test_discount_calculation():
    result = calculate_discount(100.0, 0.15)
    assert result == 85.0

def test_tax_computation():
    tax = compute_tax(49.99, 0.08)
    assert tax == 3.9992

def test_average_function():
    values = [1.1, 2.2, 3.3]
    assert average(values) == 2.2

def test_price_after_promotion():
    from myapp.pricing import apply_promotion
    price = apply_promotion(29.99, "SAVE10")
    assert price == 26.991

def test_vector_magnitude():
    from myapp.linalg import magnitude
    result = magnitude([3.0, 4.0])
    assert result == 5.0
